<!-- Generated by AI on 05/04/2026 -->

# Technical Specification

This is the technical specification for the spec detailed in .agent-os/specs/2026-05-04-phase-5-advanced-intelligence/spec.md

## Technical Requirements

### Embedding-Based Similarity Detection

- Interface: `IEmbeddingService` with methods: `Task<float[]> GetEmbeddingAsync(string text)`, `Task<IReadOnlyList<SimilarThought>> FindSimilarAsync(string userId, string thoughtId, int topN = 5)`
- `SimilarThought`: `string ThoughtId`, `string Text`, `DateTimeOffset CreatedAt`, `double SimilarityScore`
- Implementation: `AzureOpenAiEmbeddingService` — calls Azure OpenAI Embeddings API (`text-embedding-3-small` model); `NullEmbeddingService` returned when `AI:EmbeddingsEnabled` is false or API key absent
- Cosine similarity computed in-memory against all user embeddings
- Embeddings stored as a new `Embedding` property in `ThoughtEntry` — stored as a Base64-encoded float array string in Azure Table Storage (property limit: 32KB; `text-embedding-3-small` = 1536 dimensions × 4 bytes = 6KB per embedding — within limit)
- `GET /api/thoughts/{id}` response extended with `similarThoughts: SimilarThought[]` when embedding service is available
- Embeddings generated asynchronously in the background after thought creation — POST response is not delayed

### Voice-to-Text Input

- Browser-native: `window.SpeechRecognition` (or `webkitSpeechRecognition`) Web Speech API
- No backend changes required — transcription happens entirely in the browser
- `ThoughtInput` component extended with a microphone `IconButton`
- Button hidden (not rendered) when `'SpeechRecognition' in window === false`
- On click: start recognition, populate text field with `interim_results` in real time, finalize on `result` event
- Show recording indicator (pulsing red icon) while active; stop button to cancel

### Cognitive Bias Detection

- New analyzer: `ICognitiveBiasDetector` implementing `IReadOnlyList<InsightMessage> Analyze(PatternAnalysisContext context)`
- Bias patterns defined as `Dictionary<string, string[]>` in `appsettings.json` under `CognitiveBiasDetection:Patterns`
- Built-in patterns:
  - `Catastrophizing`: trigger words — always, never, everything, nothing, completely, totally, ruined, disaster, terrible, worst
  - `Overgeneralizing`: trigger words — everyone, nobody, all, none, every time, constantly, typical
  - `BlackAndWhiteThinking`: trigger words — either, or, perfect, failure, completely wrong, totally right
- Insight generated when ≥ 3 thoughts in the window contain ≥ 2 trigger words from a bias pattern: "Your recent thoughts show signs of [BiasName] — using absolute language like '[word1]', '[word2]' frequently"
- Registered as singleton and integrated into `InsightService` pipeline alongside existing analyzers

### Cross-Domain Correlation Insights

- New analyzer: `ICrossCorrelationAnalyzer` implementing `IReadOnlyList<InsightMessage> Analyze(PatternAnalysisContext context)`
- For each pair of tags with ≥ 5 co-occurrences: compute co-occurrence rate; generate insight if rate > 60%
- Time-windowed correlation: for each negative Stress thought, check if a Trading-tagged thought appears within 2 hours before it; generate insight if this pattern occurs ≥ 3 times: "Trading-related thoughts frequently precede stress entries within 2 hours"
- Registered as singleton and integrated into `InsightService`

### Personalized Recommendations

- New service: `IRecommendationService` with method `IReadOnlyList<string> GetRecommendations(WeeklyReflection reflection, IReadOnlyList<InsightMessage> insights)`
- Template-based recommendations triggered by specific insight categories and patterns
- Example templates:
  - If negative thoughts peak in evening (19:00–22:00) → "Consider a mindfulness practice before 7 PM to interrupt the evening stress pattern"
  - If Trading tag > 40% frequency → "Your thinking is heavily trading-focused. Consider a deliberate mental shutdown ritual at market close"
- Returns up to 3 recommendations
- Integrated into `WeeklyReflectionService` as an optional enrichment

### Full-Text Search Endpoint

- New action on `ThoughtsController`: `GET /api/thoughts/search?q=keyword&page=1&pageSize=20`
- Filters thoughts using case-insensitive `Contains` on `Text` and `Tags` fields — implemented in-memory after fetching all user thoughts from repository
- Reuses existing `PagedThoughtsResponse` model
- Returns empty results (not 404) when no matches found

### Data Export Endpoint

- New controller: `ExportController` in `Controllers/Export/ExportController.cs`
- `GET /api/export?format=csv` — returns all user thoughts as CSV with headers: `Id,Text,CreatedAt,Tags,Sentiment,IntensityScore`
- `GET /api/export?format=json` — returns all thoughts as JSON array
- Uses `StringBuilder` for CSV construction
- Response headers: `Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="thoughts-export-YYYY-MM-DD.csv"` and `Content-Type: text/csv` or `application/json`

## External Dependencies

- **Azure.AI.OpenAI** (or `OpenAI` NuGet) — Required for `AzureOpenAiEmbeddingService` to call the Azure OpenAI Embeddings API. Only installed if embedding feature is used.
  - **Justification:** Official Azure SDK for OpenAI integration; no alternative without raw HTTP calls to the embeddings REST endpoint.
